response:
Progress Report, Part II  
This report highlights the visual enhancements made during the game's redevelopment. Although we have significantly improved the frame rate by incorporating optimization features into the framework, the integration of new hardware-intensive functionalities, such as dynamic fluid particles and physics-based hair strands, introduces new performance challenges. We will aim to maintain a balanced approach.  
Image #1 illustrates the new belly bulge system. In the redeveloped game, each character has a specific stomach capacity that determines how much "body fluid" they can absorb through their womb, stomach, and bowels. For instance, Dr. Anya can take in 4000ml of sperm without overflowing, whereas Alet can only accommodate 2800ml. Male test subjects release a varying amount of fluid into the female during climax: a Dreamer typically ejaculates around 10-15ml, while an Elder Thing may deposit 400-600ml.  
Images #2 and #3 showcase the new cum and love juice graphics. The fluid effects are not pre-designed for sex scenes and instead activate dynamically based on the character's sensitivity, ecstasy level, and stamina. Certain character perks, obtained through testing with specific test subjects, may increase the likelihood of urinary incontinence or excessive squirting.  
Images #4 and #5 depict dynamic body interactions and skin decals in VR, with hands moving through a VR controller.  
Images #6, #7, and #8 preview upcoming bondage devices and cooperative sex scenarios. More details will be released next month.  
The May Monthly Poll and returning costume bundle will be available in a few hours.
